does_not_mean: primary-source verification of every numerical unit
permission to alter closed family decisions
higher_authority: future exact Kraken documentation or a lossless identity proof
authority.meaning: Binding internal semantic contract for subsequent Kraken research. The adopted meanings remain explicitly classified as inferred where Kraken does not publish a complete field/unit definition.
authority.revision_rule: Any contradictory higher-authority evidence creates a new version. Do not silently reinterpret or rewrite V1-derived artifacts.

rules: Event-time trade, mark, and required analytics coverage must be complete.
Analytics row existence does not prove historical lifecycle eligibility.
All outputs retain the current-roster/survivorship cap.

permitted_now: coverage, counts, identity, overlap, and multiplicity analysis

reasons: The series is signed and five-minute values equal the final one-minute value, so it is a state rather than a flow.
Typical BTC/ETH and liquid-alt values such as 0.0001-0.001 are economically coherent as 1-10 bps.
Interpreting those values as absolute USD differences is implausible across assets with very different prices.
Large distressed/new-listing extrema remain possible and must not be clipped silently.
research_rules: Use within-symbol causal changes, robust z-scores, and percentiles as primary features.
Do not call future basis funding.
Do not treat basis direction alone as a trade direction.

confidence.side: unavailable in source; price-inferred side is a proxy only

derived_fields.price_inferred_liquidation_side: long_liquidation_proxy when the causal price path is negative; short_liquidation_proxy when the causal price path is positive; ambiguous otherwise

liquidation_volume.directionality: unsigned aggregate; no native long/short side
reasons: Every overlapping BTC/ETH five-minute value equals the sum of the five one-minute values.
Cross-symbol magnitudes and examples such as fractional AAVE/TAO and large DOGE quantities are coherent with base-unit contract quantity.
A single common-USD interpretation is inconsistent with the observed cross-symbol scale.
research_rules: Do not call the aggregate series typed forced flow.
Do not claim long-versus-short liquidation from value_raw.
Use liquidation_to_lagged_oi as the primary cross-symbol intensity measure because the inferred unit cancels.
Use mark-notional only as an approximate economic-size field because liquidation prices vary within the bucket.
liquidation_volume.unit: Kraken contract base-unit quantity force-closed during the interval

confidence.tuple_mapping: structurally verified by 74,957,208 rows and exact 1m-to-5m aggregation

open_interest.directionality: unsigned gross open exposure; no long/short direction
reasons: All OHLC inequalities pass over the full retained panel.
Every overlapping BTC/ETH five-minute tuple exactly matches first/max/min/last of one-minute OI.
BTC values in thousands, ETH in tens of thousands, and token-dependent alt scales are coherent with base/contract quantity and incoherent with a common USD value.
Kraken contract specifications express minimum lots and maximum positions in the named base currency.
research_rules: Never infer long or short crowding from OI alone.
Prefer log changes and within-symbol normalization.
Use mark-notional only as a derived proxy and retain the raw base-unit series.
Do not divide OI by two or assume whether Kraken counts both sides separately without a future explicit source.
open_interest.unit: Kraken contract base-unit quantity as named by the instrument
